meta.title: Landing page cost for high conversion | Ready for ads
meta.description: Get a landing built to convert: conversion copy, Lighthouse 100 target, LCP < 2.5s, GA4 + Meta/Google Ads pixels, form validation, and CRM integration.

hero.h1: landing page cost: a conversion-ready page you can run ads to
hero.subtitle: High-conversion landing with tracking, pixels, and speed so you can scale traffic with confidence.

pain.title: You pay for clicks, but the page leaks leads
bullets: Have you ever launched ads and watched expensive clicks turn into zero qualified leads?
Have you ever checked PageSpeed and realized your page loads late and people bounce fast?
Have you ever lost a hot lead because the form fails, lacks validation, or never reaches your CRM?

benefits.title: Conversion copy
benefits.desc: Structure and wording that drive action fast: clear promise, proof, objections handled, and a CTA that feels natural.

benefits.title: Clean measurement
benefits.desc: GA4 configured with defined events and conversions, so you see the funnel, CVR, and true cost per lead.

benefits.title: Real speed
benefits.desc: Performance built-in with LCP < 2.5s as the target and a Lighthouse 100 goal to reduce drop-offs from paid traffic.

useCases.title: Lead generation
useCases.desc: A form-first landing focused on lead quality, ready for conversion campaigns and follow-up speed.

useCases.title: Waitlist
useCases.desc: A lean page to validate demand, capture intent, and measure sign-ups with consistent tracking.

useCases.title: Webinar or event
useCases.desc: Registration flow with clear agenda and speaker proof, plus pixels and GA4 events for optimization.

useCases.title: Service offer
useCases.desc: A consultative layout with social proof and objections addressed, built to book calls or request a quote.

useCases.title: Digital product
useCases.desc: A page for cold traffic and retargeting, with A/B testing hooks for headline, CTA, and section order.

options.name: GA4
options.note: Events and conversions mapped to match your funnel and reporting needs.

options.name: Google Ads
options.note: Tag and conversions aligned so optimization follows outcomes, not vanity clicks.

options.name: Meta Pixel
options.note: Standard and custom events for retargeting and higher-quality audiences.

options.name: CRM
options.note: Leads sent automatically via API/webhook, so you do not lose speed to manual exports.

options.name: A/B testing
options.note: Baseline prepared for variations in headline, CTA, and layout without rework.

steps.title: Quick alignment
steps.desc: You share the offer, audience, and goal; the structure and conversion copy are drafted.

steps.title: Build + instrumentation
steps.desc: The page ships with GA4, Meta/Google Ads pixels, validated forms, and CRM integration.

steps.title: Iterate with tests
steps.desc: You run traffic, then A/B test key elements to raise conversion rate with real data.

faq.a: Cost depends on layout complexity, number of sections, required integrations (CRM, tags, and GA4 events), A/B test variants, and your delivery timeline.

faq.q: Do you set up GA4 and ad pixels?
faq.a: Yes. GA4 events and conversions are defined, and Meta Pixel plus Google Ads tags are installed so you can optimize campaigns with consistent tracking.

faq.q: Will the landing be fast enough for paid traffic?
faq.a: Speed is a core requirement: LCP < 2.5s is the target and Lighthouse 100 is the goal. Final results also depend on assets like images, fonts, and third-party scripts.
Yes. Your form includes field validation and clear error/success feedback, reducing lost leads and improving completion rate for high-intent visitors.

faq.q: Can you integrate with my CRM?
faq.a: Yes. Leads can be sent to your CRM via API, webhook, or automation tooling, so every submission reaches your pipeline without manual steps.

ctaFinal.title: Get a clear landing page cost estimate
ctaFinal.desc: Share your offer, audience, and goal. You get a fixed-scope quote with the tracking and integrations you need to launch.
